channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Backcountry ski trip hit by avalanche led by tour outfit offering mountain adventures globally
item.description: The backcountry trip near Lake Tahoe where nine skiers remained missing after an avalanche was led by a tour outfit that promises global mountain adve...

item.title: The children of late civil rights leader Jesse Jackson honor his legacy a day after his death
item.description: Jesse Jackson’s children remember his civil rights legacy and describe him as a devoted father after his death at home

item.title: Jesse Jackson’s 1988 presidential run inspired generations to carry his message
item.description: The Rev. Jesse Jackson’s two presidential runs and his life of activism inspired leaders across generations

item.title: Fed minutes: Lower inflation needed before many officials will support rate cuts
item.description: Many Federal Reserve officials want to see inflation fall further before they would support additional interest rate cuts this year, particularly if t...

item.title: Fishermen in the eastern Caribbean fear for their lives following a deadly US strike
item.description: An organization in St. Vincent and the Grenadines is urging fishermen to take certain precautions after decrying a recent U.S. strike in the eastern C...
